N

Name - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MultiMerchant
Used indicate the specific merchant name.
Name - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Name of the renter or name from the driver license.
NDEFData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.VASResponseInfo
Google SmartTap response data in format of NDEF, the message will be encoded with Base64.
NewCardBin - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.CardInfo
The card BIN as the leading 6 or 8 digits.
NewService() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService
 
NewServices - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService
 
NO_COMM_SETTING - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult
 
NoShowFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo
No-show Indicator.
NullPin - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
This field is effective only when PIN is required.
NullPinFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Deprecated.
